steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is B, $5$.

steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Subtract 58 from both sides of the equation:
$$|q| + 58 = 63$$
$$|q| = 63 - 58 = 5$$

steps.title: Solve for q
steps.content: The absolute value equation $|q| = 5$ has two solutions: $q = 5$ and $q = -5$. Looking at the answer choices, only 5 appears as an option. B is correct.
